type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py

content:
type: DEFER
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
spec: In NDCG.compute(), the IDCG calculation currently uses ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)), which is wrong when there are fewer retrieved docs than expected relevant docs (or vice versa) — the ideal ranking should be computed purely from the number of expected relevant documents, since IDCG represents the best-possible DCG achievable given the known relevant set, independent of how many docs were actually retrieved. Fix: change 'ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))' to 'ideal_length = len(expected_ids)'. Keep the rest of the loop identical: idcg = sum(discounted_gain(rel=True, i=i, mode=mode) for i in range(1, ideal_length + 1)). Edge case: if expected_ids is empty the function already raises ValueError earlier (expected_ids is falsy check), so idcg==0 guard after is just a safety net, no change needed there. No other behavior in compute() should change from this fix.
note: NDCG idcg fix per PR: Fix Incorrect Ideal DCG Calculation in NDCG Metric

fields.spec: In NDCG.compute(), the IDCG calculation currently uses ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)), which is wrong when there are fewer retrieved docs than expected relevant docs (or vice versa) — the ideal ranking should be computed purely from the number of expected relevant documents, since IDCG represents the best-possible DCG achievable given the known relevant set, independent of how many docs were actually retrieved. Fix: change 'ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))' to 'ideal_length = len(expected_ids)'. Keep the rest of the loop identical: idcg = sum(discounted_gain(rel=True, i=i, mode=mode) for i in range(1, ideal_length + 1)). Edge case: if expected_ids is empty the function already raises ValueError earlier (expected_ids is falsy check), so idcg==0 guard after is just a safety net, no change needed there. No other behavior in compute() should change from this fix.
fields.note: NDCG idcg fix per PR: Fix Incorrect Ideal DCG Calculation in NDCG Metric

content:
type: DONE
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Implemented both: idcg fix (ideal_length=len(expected_ids) via sorted ideal_relevance list) and relevance_scores param per your SPEC. Verified: relevance_scores=None reproduces old binary DCG numerator behavior; only IDCG denominator changed per the bug fix. Manually tested graded relevance scenario -> works as specced. Existing test_ndcg 'Case 4' in tests/evaluation/test_metrics.py asserts the old buggy value (1.0) for the exact scenario this PR fixes (expected_ids longer than retrieved_ids) -- that assertion is now stale/incorrect, left untouched per submission protocol (no test file edits), but flagging in case you want to update it in your own patch.
